title: astragalus centralis
intro: Astragalus centralis is a plant species belonging to the legume family, known for its traditional use in Chinese medicine. It is valued for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus centralis include improved immune function, reduced fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. It can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder for oral consumption, or as a topical cream or ointment for external use.
